problem_summary: Meta-to-Shopify acquisition efficiency has deteriorated, with ROAS decline, CAC increase, and conversion leakage on mobile and checkout.
goal_summary: Reach ROAS >= 2.5 and CAC < 40 within 90 days while establishing a repeatable creative testing process.
notable_quotes: can't keep burning cash like this
Their ad hooks are stronger and landing pages feel clearer.
